description: Add KnownGroup domain model, Room entity/DAO/repository, database migration v4->v5, and wire into AppContainer. Also add allowedGroupIds field to Rule model and RuleEntity with proper mapping.
steps: Create domain model file app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/domain/model/KnownGroup.kt with data class KnownGroup(id: Long = 0, packageName: String, groupName: String, conversationKey: String, lastSeenAt: Long, communityParent: String? = null)

Create Room entity file app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/data/local/KnownGroupEntity.kt with @Entity(tableName = 'known_groups') and toDomain()/toEntity() extension functions. Fields: id (PrimaryKey autoGenerate), packageName, groupName, conversationKey (unique), lastSeenAt, communityParent (nullable)

Create DAO file app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/data/local/KnownGroupDao.kt with: @Upsert upsert(entity), @Query observeAll(): Flow<List<KnownGroupEntity>>, @Query getByConversationKey(key: String): KnownGroupEntity?, @Query deleteOlderThan(cutoff: Long)

Create repository file app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/data/repository/KnownGroupRepository.kt wrapping KnownGroupDao, exposing: groups: Flow<List<KnownGroup>>, suspend upsert(group: KnownGroup), suspend getByConversationKey(key: String): KnownGroup?, suspend pruneOld(maxAgeMillis: Long)
Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/domain/model/Rule.kt: add field allowedGroupIds: Set<Long> = emptySet() to the data class

Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/data/local/RuleEntity.kt: add column allowedGroupIds: String = '' to entity class. Update toDomain() to parse comma-separated longs into Set<Long> (empty string -> emptySet). Update toEntity() to join Set<Long> with commas (emptySet -> empty string).

Modify app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/data/local/AppDatabase.kt: add KnownGroupEntity to entities array, add abstract fun knownGroupDao(): KnownGroupDao, bump version to 5, add MIGRATION_4_5 that: (1) CREATE TABLE known_groups with columns id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, packageName TEXT NOT NULL, groupName TEXT NOT NULL, conversationKey TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, lastSeenAt INTEGER NOT NULL, communityParent TEXT; (2) ALTER TABLE rules ADD COLUMN allowedGroupIds TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''. Add MIGRATION_4_5 to the .addMigrations() call.
acceptance_criteria: KnownGroup domain model exists with all specified fields
KnownGroupEntity Room entity exists with proper annotations and toDomain/toEntity mappings
KnownGroupDao has upsert, observeAll, getByConversationKey, and deleteOlderThan methods
RuleEntity has allowedGroupIds: String column with proper conversion in toDomain/toEntity
AppDatabase is version 5 with MIGRATION_4_5 creating known_groups table and adding allowedGroupIds column to rules
verification: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
findings: Build requires JDK 17 (JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17) and ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk. JDK 25 is incompatible with the Kotlin compiler used by the Gradle Kotlin DSL. Android SDK was installed to /opt/android-sdk with platforms;android-35 and build-tools;35.0.0. Build command: export ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk && export JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17 && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH && ./gradlew assembleDebug
